log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Tiefling — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):15+1=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):7+1=8 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:14+4=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 14 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Tiefling — Winged Striker: SUCCESS. 13 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Moving to shake Cult Fanatic awake from charm.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Cult Fanatic.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Tiefling — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Tiefling — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:9+3=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Tiefling — Winged Striker.
→ Tiefling — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:16+6=22 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Tiefling — Winged Striker.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Tiefling — Winged Striker.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:18+3=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 6casting_mod force damage. Tiefling — Winged Striker HP: NaN/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Tiefling — Winged Striker.
→ Tiefling — Winged Striker: DEX save [d20:5+6=11 vs DC 11] SUCCESS. No effect.
